title: Listen Before Dying
description: Talk to Mordecai and learn the first survival rules.

objectives.description: Get Mordecai to explain the first rule.

title: Inventory Check
description: Confirm Carl's jacket is real gear and the lack of pants is real trouble.

title: Questionable Gift
description: Open the tutorial chest and recover the first explosive crafting material.

title: Carl Makes A Problem
description: Craft the first crude explosive from dungeon materials.

title: First Blood
description: Defeat the tutorial enemy without pretending this is normal.

title: Dress Code Violation
description: Find something, anything, that counts as pants.

objectives.description: Pick up one item from the floor.

title: Bad Flooring
description: Learn that terrain can hate you too.

objectives.description: Trigger one hazard or terrain effect.
